Rapido bike rides are paying ~₹6–7/km gross and ~₹1–2/km net after costs. This is not earnings — it’s exploitation. Rate card says ₹11–10/km, but after ~25% Rapido cut, 5% GST, unpaid pickup & rounding, payouts drop badly. Example: 10.1 km drop + ~2 km pickup = ₹90 payout ₹2 platform fee + GST deducted Total distance ≈ 12 km 👉 Actual earning ≈ ₹6.5–7/km Bike running cost: Petrol ≈ ₹3.4/km Wear & tear ≈ ₹1.5/km 👉 Cost ≈ ₹5/km 👉 Net left ≈ ₹1.5–2/km
